_comment: Launcher app registry — HAND-CURATED CONFIG, NOT ingested into the brain (system config is not knowledge-about-you; it never enters the brain's sources/chunks — see docs/app-platform.md 'Launcher app-registry schema'). One entry per app: {name, short_name, icon, url, health}. The launcher (#apps view) renders a card per entry, health-pings each entry's `health` URL (connected/offline), and links out to `url`. Edit by hand to add an app.
